docket_entries.description: AMENDED SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, ANNA SERVED SEP-14-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, CHING (JENNY)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, ANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG, CHING (JENNY) THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 67 BRUCE AVENUE. C, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, ANNA AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, CHING (JENNY) SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, ANNA SERVED SEP-14-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, CHING (JENNY)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, CHING (JENNY)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, CHING (JENNY)
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF YEE, ANNA AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, CHING (JENNY)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, CHING (JENNY)
